title: K-200 Integration Acceptance Test Procedure
text:
# K-200 Integration Acceptance Test Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-404-A. Revision: A. Type: procedure. Author: Priya Nair. Created: 2023-10-17. Last modified: 2024-02-02. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Integration subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1097, P-1019, P-1115, P-1154.
